title: linaria reflexa f. lanigera
intro: Linaria reflexa f. lanigera, also known as the woolly toadflax, is a flowering plant that belongs to the figwort family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, soothing digestive problems, and reducing fever. The herbal preparations of Linaria reflexa f. lanigera include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, but further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
